text: Table: webauthn_credentials. Description: webauthn_credentials table. WARNING: This is an EAV (Entity-Attribute-Value) table. Do NOT use attribute names as column names in SQL. Access pattern: WHERE public_key = '<attribute_key>' to filter, and read client_data_json for the value. Entity linked via user_id referencing users. Columns: id (serial) [PK]; user_id (int4) [FK -> users.id]; credential_id (bytea); public_key (bytea); sign_count (int4); credential_id_b64 (varchar); aaguid (varchar); device_type (varchar); transports (text); backed_up (bool); attestation_object (text); client_data_json (text); friendly_name (varchar); registered_at (timestamptz); last_used_at (timestamptz); last_authenticator_data (text); created_at
